dailyNews.description: The Cuban government says it has pardoned and released 2,010 prisoners, a sweeping move that comes as the island nation grapples with pressure from the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi: Here's what we know
dailyNews.description: President Trump fired Attorney General Pam Bondi on Thursday after months of his waning support. CBS News covers the lead-up, her acting replacement and what this means.

dailyNews.title: Justice Department employee who was prosecuted over Jan. 6 Capitol attack resigns
